chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-3523 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution. 30.09.2025. Mr. Muhammad Akram Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- Learned counsel for the Petitioner states that he does not press this Petition as the Petitioner would approach the statutory Forum in view of the amendments made in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act 2024, providing for Bail Applications to be entertained. As such, the instant Petition stands dismissed as not pressed leaving the Petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
